developerProfile.name: Chinna Durai
developerProfile.title: Software Developer
developerProfile.shortBio: I am a performance-focused full-stack developer specializing in building highly reliable web applications, distributed APIs, and optimized databases. Passionate about algorithms, robust type safety, and system scalability.
developerProfile.longBio: I am a software engineer with 1.5 years of experience building modern full-stack web applications. I specialize in designing highly performant React-based user interfaces and architecting secure, type-safe Node.js APIs. My design philosophy centers on architectural honesty and performance optimization: building clean, modular, and well-tested codebases. I enjoy solving algorithmic challenges, designing robust database schemas, and applying solid computer science principles to build products that scale efficiently.

projectsData.title: Aether Analytics: Real-time Cloud Metrics
projectsData.description: A high-frequency cloud metrics dashboard visualizing system telemetry, container ingress, and database read/write throughput in real-time. Features active WebSockets, optimized state buffers, and interactive canvas timelines.
highlights: Engineered a custom Canvas2D render layer capable of plotting 50,000 telemetry datapoints smoothly at 60fps
Designed a client-side sliding window stream buffer to manage network data packets with zero UI thread freezing
Optimized serialization payload sizes by 40% using customized JSON schemas and efficient compression techniques

projectsData.title: Synapse IDE: Collaborative Code Workspace
projectsData.description: An in-browser collaborative text workspace featuring code execution sandboxes, operational transform systems (CRDTs), and shared cursor presence for remote engineering teams.
highlights: Integrated Yjs CRDT library with WebRTC to enable conflict-free concurrent editing and live cursor presence tracking
Designed secure, lightweight sandboxed execution runtimes using isolated Docker containers and gRPC streams
Implemented file-system indexing tree using dynamic trie structures for fast folder navigations and file operations

projectsData.title: Veloce: High-Performance Headless E-Commerce Engine
projectsData.description: A headless e-commerce pipeline built for sub-second page transitions, using static pre-rendering, edge middleware cache layers, and predictive prefetching.
highlights: Achieved 99/100 Lighthouse performance metrics via asset compression, dynamic route prefetching, and SSR hydration tuning
Configured edge caching middlewares to route localized pricing schedules and manage high-volume inventories concurrently
Created a stateful multi-step cart orchestrator featuring optimistic UI state and secure API gateways

projectsData.title: Hyperion: Serverless Deployment Plane
projectsData.description: A DevOps administration console that streamlines Docker container orchestrations across virtual private servers, featuring instant SSL provisioning, health-check alarms, and automated blue-green rolls.
highlights: Designed a comprehensive network-topology viewer using declarative interactive layout algorithms
Established real-time alarm triggers via WebSockets connected to isolated cluster services
Integrated automated TLS certificate generation using Let’s Encrypt client protocols

description: Engineered high-performance web client architectures using React and TypeScript, optimizing component rendering trees and saving 28% in bundle load times.
Designed and implemented robust backend microservices with Node.js and Express, modeling relational schemas in PostgreSQL using Sequelize ORM.
Optimized heavy database query performance and configured Redis cache systems, resulting in a 40% reduction in query latencies.
Instituted strict ESLint validation standards, automated testing with Jest, and clean Git workflows, leading to 20% fewer production integration issues.

contactSection.title: Let's build something exceptional
contactSection.description: Whether you want to build highly performant web applications, optimize complex database schemas, design clean microservice APIs, or discuss custom software engineering challenges, feel free to drop a message.
